messages.content: Summarize dangerous mission telemetry near Alexanderplatz restricted airspace.

message.content: {"agent":"telemetry","mission_reachability":{"can_complete_final_waypoint_and_return":true,"estimated_remaining_range_m":920.0,"required_range_with_detour_m":760.0,"reserve_after_return_m":160.0,"safety_buffer_m":120.0},"risk_flags":[{"type":"restricted_zone_proximity","severity":"medium","timestamp":"2026-06-28T10:00:08Z","observed_value":46.5,"threshold":200.0,"evidence":"Drone is 46 m from Alexanderplatz restricted airspace on the autopilot heading."},{"type":"breach_imminent","severity":"high","timestamp":"2026-06-28T10:00:08Z","observed_value":6.5,"threshold":12.0,"evidence":"At 7.2 m/s the drone breaches the no-fly boundary in ~6.5 s if autopilot is not overridden."}],"summary":{"min_battery_pct":64.0,"max_speed_mps":8.4,"min_link_quality_pct":79.0,"distance_to_restricted_zone_m":46.5,"seconds_to_breach_at_current_speed":6.5}}

risk_flags.evidence: Drone is 46 m from Alexanderplatz restricted airspace on the autopilot heading.
At 7.2 m/s the drone breaches the no-fly boundary in ~6.5 s if autopilot is not overridden.
